positive: A scientific cross-section illustration of a mythical bioluminescent deep-sea creature. The drawing must be highly detailed, labeled (conceptually), and rendered in the style of an antique scientific plate (like Audubon). Use deep blues, blacks, and glowing cyan highlights. Focus on anatomical precision and elegant composition.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, watercolor, messy
